chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No. 270 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For orders as to non-prosecution as office objection not complied. ----------- 04.02.2025. Mr. Muhammad Inzimam Sharif, Advocate for Applicant. ************ Matter is pending for non-prosecution since 2022 as no compliance has been made; therefore, this Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz
